subject: Review finding: archival invariant must not be scoped away from buffers
body: Finding from Shaded read-only review. Severity: important. The owner correction is encoded in knowledge-preservation-over-fitness-warnings.md, but that rule's Scope section later says the rule does not apply to buffer surfaces like pending-graduations.md. Because the correction was triggered by an archive-first pending-graduations route, a future reader could treat the new archive-after-processing paragraph as scoped away from the exact buffer case it must govern. Suggested cure: either move the archive-after-processing invariant to a surface whose scope covers all curation archive moves, or amend the Scope paragraph to state that preservation-vs-fitness does not apply to buffers, but process-before-archive applies to every source surface including buffers. No other blocking findings from Shaded gate-runner pass; markdownlint/diff-check passed and fitness remains the known critical routing signal.
